title: Entry-Level Radiologist at LV Prasad Eye Institute

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at LV Prasad Eye Institute
jsonLd.description:
LV Prasad Eye Institute, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Ranchi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About LV Prasad Eye Institute:
LV Prasad Eye Institute is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LV Prasad Eye Institute!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
